name: Saudi Arabia Refineries Co.
summary: Saudi Arabia Refineries Co. engages in the extraction of crude oil in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It is also involved in the construction of refineries and petrochemical plants; buying and selling of lands and real estate; and management and leasing of non-residential real estate properties, as well as dealing in securities. Saudi Arabia Refineries Co. was founded in 1960 and is based in Jeddah, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
